positive: A minimalist, stylized illustration of a whimsical gathering of forest creatures: a fox, a wise owl, a gentle deer, and a playful rabbit, gathered around a glowing, oversized mushroom. The composition should be centered and highly symmetrical, emphasizing clean, bold outlines and flat color blocking (mid-century modern aesthetic). The style should combine whimsical fairy tale elements with graphic design principles. Use a palette of deep emerald greens, sapphire blues, burnt oranges, and cream accents. Lighting should be soft, diffused, and ambient, casting no harsh shadows. The overall feeling must be serene, magical, and perfect for screen printing on apparel. High detail, vector art quality, seamless pattern potential.
negative: blur, low detail, noisy, watermark, text, logo, copyright, signature, artifact, smudges, fuzzy, bokeh, bokeh, out of focus, messy, poor composition, complex background
